---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Kair0s.

## 💡 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What are the current limitations?

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like in detail. Include:

- How it should work
- User interface considerations
- Technical requirements
- Integration with existing features

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Cases
How would this feature be used? Provide specific examples:

1. **Use Case 1**: [Description]
2. **Use Case 2**: [Description]
3. **Use Case 3**: [Description]

## 🎨 Design Ideas
If you have ideas about the UI/UX design, please include:

- Mockups or wireframes
- Design inspiration
- User flow considerations

## 🔧 Technical Considerations
- [ ] Requires backend changes
- [ ] Requires database changes
- [ ] Requires API changes
- [ ] Requires new dependencies
- [ ] Breaking changes required

## 📈 Priority
How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Blocker for my use case
- [ ] High - Significantly improves workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute
- [ ] I'd be willing to implement this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I need guidance to contribute

## 📚 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues or discussions:

- Related issue: #[issue number]
- Discussion: #[discussion number]

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have read the documentation
- [ ] This feature aligns with project goals
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing users
